response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Conversational banter and musical lyrics match the VTubers' spoken audio and reference context accurately. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the banter and songs, correcting previous timing errors and creating custom translations to represent the casual and playful tone. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to match the vocal bursts and rapid song segments, avoiding delays. All timestamps have been validated to ensure start times are strictly before end times.

subtitles.english: Team Friends, Team Friends

subtitles.original: チーム友達！
subtitles.english: Team Friends!

subtitles.original: いぇーい！ よーよーよー！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yo yo yo!

subtitles.original: ヤバい、柄悪くない？ヤバい！
subtitles.english: This is bad, don't we look like thugs? Oh my!

subtitles.original: うん、見えんの。あ、ごめん、見えんのよ。ね、ヤバいよね！
subtitles.english: Yeah, you can see it... Ah, sorry, you can see it. Right? It's crazy!

subtitles.original: おーい、柄が悪いぞー！
subtitles.english: Hey, we look like thugs!

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、この帽子のせいでね、ちょっとヤカラっぽくなっちゃうけどね。
subtitles.english: Because of this cap, we look a bit like punks.

subtitles.original: うん、ちょっとヤカラっぽくなっちゃうけどね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, we look a bit like punks, though.

subtitles.original: うううん、カッコいいじゃん！みこ、こんな格好いつかしてみてたかったんだよー！
subtitles.english: No, but it's cool! Miko always wanted to try dressing like this!

subtitles.original: でもこれ、バチくそ高いからこれ気をつけて。
subtitles.english: But listen, this is crazy expensive, so be careful.

subtitles.original: 今日ね、来たらね、これ用意してあるんでって言われて、「えっ、何これ？」って。
subtitles.english: Today when I arrived, they told me they had this prepared, and I was like, "Wait, what is this?"

subtitles.original: 重たいでしょ？ うん、重たい。でもカッコいい。
subtitles.english: It's heavy, right? / Yeah, it's heavy. But it's cool.

subtitles.original: あの、ロック・リーみたいになってるから、今うち等。 ロック・リー！
subtitles.english: We're like Rock Lee right now. / Rock Lee!

subtitles.original: おもりつけてるからね、今。
subtitles.english: We've got weights on right now.

subtitles.original: 解き放たれたら、もっと動けるの？ そうそう。外したらね、いい感じになりますけど。
subtitles.english: If we take them off, can we move even faster? / Exactly. If we take them off, we'll be super fast.

subtitles.original: え、でも、ころさん、7周年おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: But anyway, Koro-san, happy 7th anniversary!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ありがとう。7周年なんだよ、ころね。 ねー、すごい！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you. It's my 7th anniversary! / Right? Amazing!

subtitles.original: ね、すごいよね。え、待って、みこちゃんの衣装見て。
subtitles.english: Right, it's amazing. Oh, wait, look at Miko-chan's outfit.

subtitles.original: これ誕生日で着てたやつね！ はい、着てたやつね。可愛い！
subtitles.english: This is the one you wore for your birthday! / Yes, the one I wore. It's so cute!

subtitles.original: え、後ろも見せて、後ろも。ちょっとあの、今回用意してくれたこの装飾に、なんかマッチしてて...
subtitles.english: Show me the back too, the back. / The accessories they prepared for this match it so well...

subtitles.original: お揃いなんですけど。 メっちゃマッチしてます。
subtitles.english: ...it's like we're matching. / It matches perfectly.

subtitles.original: え、でも、それでいうところねのこの衣装さ、ゲマズのイベントのやつじゃない？
subtitles.english: But speaking of which, Korone, this outfit... Isn't this from the Gamers event?

subtitles.original: そうそうそう！超超超超超ゲマズの衣装！ 可愛いじゃん！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes! The Cho-Cho-Cho-Cho-Cho Gamers outfit! / It's so cute!

subtitles.original: みこちゃん、今日ね、これが初お披露目なんだ、この衣装の。
subtitles.english: Miko-chan, today is actually the first time I'm revealing this outfit!

subtitles.original: えっ！？これで！？ これでチーム友達でちょっと初... 初お披露目！
subtitles.english: What?! In this?! / With "Team Tomodachi", this is the first... / First reveal!

subtitles.original: 初お披露目しちゃったんですけど。 え、いいじゃん、いいじゃん！可愛い。
subtitles.english: I ended up revealing it for the first time like this. / Hey, that's great! It's so cute.

subtitles.original: ちょっと、ちょっと短くない？ なんか、エッチじゃない？
subtitles.english: Wait, isn't it a bit short? / Isn't it a bit sexy?

subtitles.original: そうなん、ちょっとこれめっちゃ短いんだよね、大丈夫？ お尻丸見えじゃん！
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's actually super short. Is it okay? / Your butt is totally visible!

subtitles.original: こら！見せるんじゃないよ！ 大大丈夫かな？ しかもね、ころなんかさ...
subtitles.english: Hey! Don't show it! / I wonder if it's okay. / And also, they told me...

subtitles.original: めっちゃ胸がパツパツって言われてて、これ。 いや、なんかちょっとシワができてるもん、パツパツで。
subtitles.english: ...that my chest is super tight in this. / Yeah, there are actually some wrinkles because it's so tight.

subtitles.original: 弾け飛びそうだよ、なんか。 たぶんね、サイズが合ってないんだと思う。あ、でも、これくらいがいいですからね。
subtitles.english: It looks like it's going to burst open. / I think the size might be wrong. But well, this much is just right.

subtitles.original: え、写真撮ろう、写真！ 写真撮りたい！
subtitles.english: Hey, let's take a picture! / I want to take a picture!

subtitles.original: ちょっとアップめで撮りたいな。いい感じ、うん。 じゃあ、しゃがもう。
subtitles.english: I want to take a close-up. Looks good, yeah. / Let's squat down then.

subtitles.original: しゃがむか。よー！ よー！
subtitles.english: Let's squat. Yo! / Yo!

subtitles.original: あ、いいじゃん！ よーよー！スパイダーマンみたいになっちゃった。
subtitles.english: Oh, this is great! / Yo, yo! I look like Spider-Man.

subtitles.original: よーよー！
subtitles.english: Yo, yo!

subtitles.original: え、サングラスも取ってさ... あ、サングラス取るからね！
subtitles.english: Hey, let's take off the sunglasses too... / Oh, we're taking them off!

subtitles.original: よいしょ、よいしょ。ちょっと待ってね、みんなね。よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Heave-ho, heave-ho. / Wait a moment, everyone. There we go.

subtitles.original: 行くよ！せーの... はい！
subtitles.english: Here we go! One, two... / Cheese!

subtitles.original: あ、いい感じ！ あ、アップめで撮れた。
subtitles.english: Oh, that looks great! / Ah, we got a close-up.

subtitles.original: アップめで撮りたい、いぇーい！ カメラをいただきましてね。あ、どう？
subtitles.english: I want a close-up, yeah! / Let me hold the camera... How's this?

subtitles.original: いぇーい！よー！撮れてる？ チーム友達。 チーム友達、俺たち何？
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yo! Did you get it? / Team friends. / Team friends, what are we?

subtitles.original: どこ歌ってんねん！ いぇーい！
subtitles.english: Which part are you singing?! / Yeah!

subtitles.original: でもさ、この曲選んでくれたの嬉しかったよ。
subtitles.english: But you know, I was so happy you chose this song.

subtitles.original: やっぱ「チーム友達」っていうぐらいの歌だから、友達と歌いたくて。
subtitles.english: Since the song is literally called "Team Friends", I wanted to sing it with a friend.

subtitles.original: だから、誰でもよかったんだけど、別に。友達だからみんな。 おい！
subtitles.english: So, honestly, anyone would have been fine, since everyone is my friend. / Hey!

subtitles.original: 嘘、嘘！特に、特にみこみこと歌いたかった！
subtitles.english: Just kidding, just kidding! Especially, I especially wanted to sing with Miko-miko!

subtitles.original: ああ、なるほどね。チーム友達だからね、当たり前ちゃん！
subtitles.english: Ah, I see. / Because we are team friends, of course!

subtitles.original: チーム友達、いぇーい！
subtitles.english: Team friends, yeah!

subtitles.original: でも、ちょっとそろそろ、次の曲なんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: But, isn't it about time for the next song?

subtitles.original: あ、そう、もうちょっとね、もうちょっとだけ続くのじゃよ、なんだけど。 エ、次どんな感じなの？
subtitles.english: Oh right, there's actually a little bit more to go before that. / Oh, what is the next one like?

subtitles.original: え、次はね、あの、パンツですね。え？パンツ？
subtitles.english: Next is, well... "Pants". / Eh? Pants?

subtitles.original: パンツ。 え？パンツ？
subtitles.english: Pants. / Eh? Pants?

subtitles.original: 恥ずかしい。やめて、撮らないで。撮らないで！ 待って、待って。パンツって、この、穿いてるパンツってこと？
subtitles.english: It's embarrassing. Stop, don't take pictures! Don't look! / Wait, wait. By "pants", do you mean the underwear we're wearing?

subtitles.original: え、みこさん穿いてないの？ え？ みこさん穿いてないの？パンツ。
subtitles.english: Wait, Miko-san, aren't you wearing any? / Eh? / Miko-san, aren't you wearing pants?

subtitles.original: 安心してください、穿いてますよ！穿いてる？ あ、よかった、じゃあ。
subtitles.english: Please rest assured, I am wearing them! Are you? / Ah, thank goodness then.

subtitles.original: え、ころねはまだ、これからなのよ、パンツ。 え？穿いてないってこと？
subtitles.english: Wait, for Korone, it's actually coming up next... "Pants". / Eh? Meaning you're not wearing them right now?

subtitles.original: ころねはちょっと、これからなの。 え？これから？ これから。
subtitles.english: For Korone, it's just coming up next. / Eh? Next? / Next.

subtitles.original: ごめん、みこみこ、これからだから、ころねパンツ。 ぱ、ぱ、パンツ？えっ？
subtitles.english: Sorry, Miko-miko, but my "Pants" are coming up next. / Pa... Pa... Pants? What?

subtitles.original: PANTS
